benefits.description: Strong appetite suppression when dosing, comes back after 3-4 days
Used for weight loss via appetite suppression

side_effects.description: No appetite at all in first couple days after dose increase from 1mg to 2mg

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg/week, titrated to 2mg/week after a few weeks to a month, then to 2mg twice weekly (4mg/week total) after 4 months. Uses PRN dosing when food cravings return every 3-4 days. Notes that some people need up to 12mg/week based on clinical trials. Emphasizes need to force macronutrient intake despite appetite suppression.
